title: PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT - 211info
text: PORTLAND DAY TREATMENT PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated intensive therapeutic services and education including medication management, skills training, academic instruction, individual and family therapy, as well as 24/7 crisis response for families. 1715 SE 32nd Place Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Ages 5-18 who have behavioral and/or mental health condition that interfere with their ability to learn in a school environment Hours: Monday-Friday 8:45am-2:45pm. Services delivered during normal school hours with an extended calendar. Email (503) 813-7760 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 813-7760 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call the Access Department for more information and to make a referral. FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4pm Services: Psychiatric Day Treatment If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
